channel.title: RSS Aggregator Feed
channel.description: An aggregated feed of Technology-related news

item.title: Hacks season 5 episode 3 has only just dropped — but there's a major release date change coming to the hit HBO Max show's schedule
item.description: Hacks season 5 has been treating us to one episode a week on HBO Max — but for the next fortnight, things are looking a little different.

item.title: NYT Connections Sports Edition today: Hints and answers for April 24, 2026
item.description: Connections: Sports Edition is a New York Times word game about finding common sports threads between words. How to solve the day's puzzle.

item.title: NYT Pips hints, answers for April 24, 2026
item.description: The New York Times' latest game, Pips, brings domino fun to your desktop. How to play Pips as well as hints in case you get stuck.

item.title: NYT Connections hints today: Clues, answers for April 24, 2026
item.description: Connections is a New York Times word game that's all about finding the "common threads between words." How to solve the puzzle.

item.title: NYT Strands hints, answers for April 24, 2026
item.description: The NYT Strands hints and answers you need to make the most of your puzzling experience.

item.title: Wordle today: Answer, hints for April 24, 2026
item.description: Here's the answer for "Wordle" #1770 on April 24 as well as a few hints, tips, and clues to help you solve it yourself.

item.title: US soldier arrested for allegedly making over $400,000 on Polymarket with classified Maduro information
item.description: United States soldier Gannon Ken Van Dyke has been arrested and charged for placing bets on prediction marketplace Polymarket using classified information he had access to related to the capture of former Venezuelan president Nicolás Maduro. The US Army Special Forces master sergeant, who was directly involved with the planning and execution of the operation, allegedly made $409,881 in profits. According to the Department of Justice, Van Dyke created a Polymarket account around December 26, 2025 and made 13 bets related to Maduro from December 27 to January 2. He took the “Yes” position on sev...
